### Scenario Health Alerts

- **Video Pin Poster - Deals (4263863):** Last execution on Apr 12 returned `[403] Sorry, this image is broken. Please pick a different image.` from Pinterest `createPin` module. Scenario needs the image URL fixed or the queue cleared. One of 2 executions that day errored (status 3).
- **All 3 video poster scenarios** haven't fired since Apr 13 ‚Äî possible schedule issue or they're webhook-triggered and nothing new came in. Investigate if these should be running daily.
- **All 3 image pin posters** are healthy: 100% success rate, firing multiple times daily on schedule.
